auth.signInToContinue: Sign in to continue planning your adventures
auth.heroSubtitle: Drag-and-drop itineraries, real-time collaboration, and smart reminders — all in one workspace.
auth.trustSignIn: Sign-in handled by Google · no password stored
auth.trustPrivacy: We never read your email or contacts
auth.termsNotice: By signing in, you agree to our Terms of Service.

trips.title: Your Group Trips
trips.subtitle: Plan, collaborate, and explore together.
trips.startNewJourneyDesc: Invite friends, vote on destinations, and plan together.
trips.joinTripDesc: Enter the {{count}}-character invite code provided by your group organizer.
trips.askFriend: Ask the friend who set up the trip.
trips.endBeforeStart: End date cannot be before the start date

overview.inviteDesc: Share this unique invite code with your friends so they can join your trip {{title}}.
overview.suggestAndVoteDesc: Pick spots from the map and let your group rank them.
overview.howToStep1: Tell your friends to sign in to TripFlow
overview.howToStep2: Go to the Trips page and click "Join Trip Using Code"
overview.howToStep3: Paste or enter the code to instantly join

plan.nothingToVoteDesc: Pick a few candidate places first — then come back here to rank them with your group.
plan.noPlacesPickedDesc: Tap any spot on the map (cafés, attractions, restaurants…) and add it as a candidate.

finances.title: Trip Finances
finances.viewAndAudit: View and audit every logged transaction in this trip workspace.
finances.trackMoneyOwe: Track the money you owe others.
finances.observeBudget: Observe trip budget metrics and expense breakdowns.
finances.tipRecordExpense: Tip: click 'Record Expense' to log new costs.
finances.noOneOwesYou: No one owes you money right now. Happy travels!
finances.youDoNotOweAnyone: You do not owe anyone right now. Splendid job!
finances.noTransactionsDesc: Start tracking trip costs by using the "Record Expense" button at the top.
finances.allTripMembersIncluded: All trip members included in split
finances.uploadReceiptFormat: PNG, JPG or PDF up to 10MB
finances.recordAndSplitDesc: Add a new expense and choose how to distribute the cost.
finances.noOneOwesYou: No one owes you money right now. Happy travels!
finances.automaticSettlementsDesc: All transactions listed are calculated based on your group expenses inside this trip workspace. Clicking "Remind" sends a clean instant push notification.
finances.scanQrApp: Scan this QR image using your bank app to transfer the payment.
finances.scanQrAnyApp: Scan the QR using any Thai Mobile Banking app to transfer exactly <1>฿{{amount}}</1>.
finances.noPaymentDetailsDesc: {{name}} hasn't registered a PromptPay QR, PromptPay ID, or Bank Account yet. Please settle up offline, then click "Mark as Paid" below to record the payment.
finances.receivingDetailsDesc: Provide your PromptPay ID or Bank Account info so others can settle up easily.
finances.selectedChannelDesc: Only the selected channel will be shown to other users to settle up with you.
finances.fillInAllBankFields: Fill in all Bank fields before saving.
finances.providePromptPayIdOrQr: Provide a PromptPay ID or QR Code image.
finances.uploadPromptPayQrFormat: PNG, JPG, or WEBP up to 5MB
finances.errorReadQR: Failed to read QR image file
finances.errorBankFields: All three bank fields (Bank Name, Account Number, and Account Holder Name) must be filled, or all left empty.
finances.errorSelectMobileBanking: Cannot select Mobile Banking as your preferred receiving channel because your bank details are incomplete. Please fill in Bank Name, Account Number, and Account Holder Name.
finances.errorSelectPromptPay: Cannot select PromptPay as your preferred receiving channel because your PromptPay details are incomplete. Please provide a PromptPay ID or upload a QR Code image.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account settings and preferences.
settings.themeDesc: Switches the entire app, including the login screen.
settings.profileDesc: Your personal information synced from your Google account.
settings.profilePictureDesc: Managed automatically by your connected Google account.
settings.googleOAuthNotice: Your account is currently managed via Google OAuth. To update your name or profile picture, please make the changes directly in your Google account settings.

notFound.heading: Journey Interrupted
notFound.description: The path you are looking for has been moved or does not exist. Let's redirect your compass back to the main map.
